# Quillian Shadowmoon

A renowned traveling bard who brings his music to every corner he visits.

> **Ancestry:** Simiah
> **Community:** Highborne
> **Role:** Performer

## Features

**Channel:** Whenever this ally gains the spotlight, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Captivate the Audience:** **Spend 1 token** to have _Quillian_ temporarily _Distract_ a target within Close range, reducing that target’s Difficulty by −2. You may spend 3 additional tokens for each extra target you wish to Distract in this way.
